tools.name: pricetik_search
tools.description: Discovery search across PriceTik surfaces (shopping/hotels/events) — see the `surface` param for what each value returns. For a SPECIFIC intent prefer the dedicated tool (`pricetik_hotel_search`, `pricetik_activity_search`) for richer, date-accurate results in their own widget; use `pricetik_search`

tools.name: pricetik_status
tools.description: Check Intel API health and feature flag state. Use before making calls to verify the API is available. Returns current status, resolved tier, and active feature flags. For an authenticated caller it also returns an `account` block — `tokenBalance` and `tokensInCooldown`. The block is omitted for ano

tools.name: pricetik_hotel_search
tools.description: Search hotels by DESTINATION (city, region, or landmark) + dates + guest count — `destination` is geographic, NOT a hotel name. For a SPECIFIC named hotel ("the Wynn"), resolve it first with pricetik_destinations (returns a providerPropertyId) and pass that to pricetik_hotel_get_booking_url / _detai

tools.name: pricetik_hotel_price_check
tools.description: Check current rates across all hotel providers for a specific property and date range. Returns per-provider pricing with availability status. Pass EITHER propertyId (PriceTik UUID) OR providerPropertyId (the handle from a hotel search or destination lookup) — exactly one — so you can price a propert

tools.name: pricetik_hotel_details
tools.description: Get full property content for a PriceTik hotel — name, description, star rating, amenities, paid extras, nearby points of interest, address, contact, segments, and gallery imagery. Look up by PriceTik UUID (propertyId) or providerPropertyId returned from a hotel search; exactly one is required. Use

tools.name: pricetik_hotel_get_booking_url
tools.description: Generate a one-click signed PriceTik checkout URL for a hotel stay. Stay-based form (preferred for agents): pass providerPropertyId + checkIn/checkOut + guests/rooms (+ optional roomCode) and the server resolves the best live rate itself. Or pass a rateKey from pricetik_hotel_price_check directly; i

tools.name: pricetik_activity_search
tools.description: Search bookable tours, attractions, and excursions by destination + dates via Hotelbeds Activities. Returns activities with price-from in the requested display currency (USD by default), plus the source EUR price for transparency. Use a 3-letter Hotelbeds destination code (e.g. PMI, BCN, NYC, LON).

tools.name: pricetik_ticket_search
tools.description: Search LIVE-EVENT TICKETS — concerts, theater, sports, comedy — by name, type, city, and date window (to attend a specific event). DISTINCT from pricetik_activity_search (tours/attractions) and pricetik_search (retail products), neither of which return event tickets. Each result carries venue, city,

tools.name: pricetik_ticket_details
tools.description: Full detail for one LIVE-EVENT TICKET listing (by `id` or slug from pricetik_ticket_search): venue, date, performers/teams, the from-price, a pricetik.com/go/ checkout link, and OTHER upcoming dates for the same event so you can offer alternatives. Affiliate inventory — surface the checkout link to

tools.name: pricetik_events_near
tools.description: LIVE-EVENT TICKETS (concerts, theater, sports) NEAR A POINT during a stay — answers "what shows are on near this hotel while I'm there?". Pass the hotel/POI coordinates (hotel-search and hotel-details rows carry latitude/longitude) plus the stay window; results are distance-sorted within `radiusKm`

tools.name: pricetik_activity_details
tools.description: Full content for one activity — description, highlights, gallery (XL images), meeting point, redemption type, and bookable rates with rateKeys. Hand the activity code from `pricetik_activity_search` to this tool to get everything needed to compare modalities and surface a checkout link via `pricetik

tools.name: pricetik_activity_get_booking_url
tools.description: Return a pricetik.com/tickets/... checkout URL pre-filled with the trip parameters. Verifies a bookable rate exists for the requested dates before handing the URL back. The user — not the agent — completes the booking on the URL (matches the hotel certification boundary). Free at every tier. Pass an

tools.name: pricetik_flexible_dates
tools.description: Find the cheapest contiguous N-night stay within a flexible date window. Backed by the cached `hotel_price_history` hypertable — never calls Hotelbeds. Pass either `propertyId` (specific hotel) or `destination` (top-25 properties in radius). Returns up to 10 candidate `(checkIn, checkOut, propertyId

tools.name: pricetik_trip_plan
tools.description: Single-call orchestrated trip planner — stitches top hotels + recommended activities + estimated spend into one response (skips the manual "search hotels → search activities → stitch" fan-out). Pass destination + dates (optional budget, interests, star rating, no-resort-fees). See the `includeTicket

tools.name: pricetik_destinations
tools.description: Resolve free-text into the canonical shape other PriceTik tools need. Two cases: (1) a DESTINATION ("Las Vegas", "Mallorca") → hotel-search-friendly text + the Hotelbeds activity destination code (for pricetik_activity_search) + country + subtitle (kind:"destination"); (2) a SPECIFIC NAMED HOTEL ("t

tools.name: pricetik_compare_destinations
tools.description: Apples-to-apples destination comparison. Pass 2–4 destinations + same date window + same guest count. Returns median 4★ nightly rate, top-3 hotels per destination by deal score, top-3 activities, and a seasonal-premium flag (event-window markers like "F1 weekend in Vegas"). Use `pricetik_destination

tools.name: pricetik_my_trips
tools.description: List the authenticated user's trips — bookings grouped by destination + overlapping date window. Each trip carries the hotel + all activities, total spend, days-until-departure countdown, and per-member manage URLs. Status filter: 'upcoming' | 'past' | 'all' (default). Requires a bearer API key mint

tools.name: pricetik_room_types
tools.description: Filtered, ranked room catalog for a property. Reads cached hotel_property_content.rooms and joins cheapest cached rate per room when you pass a stay window. Filter by bedType (KING/QUEEN/DOUBLE/TWIN/SOFA), suite, kitchenette, accessible, minAdults. Cache-only — never calls Hotelbeds.

tools.name: pricetik_hotel_review_summary
tools.description: Synthesised review summary for a property — score, count, star rating, segments, and inferred theme cues for cleanliness, location, staff, value, and comfort. Cache-only — themes are derived from the cached amenity content (Hotelbeds doesn't expose per-category review breakdowns), and surfaced as -1

tools.name: pricetik_resolve_activity
tools.description: Resolve a free-text activity/event NAME ("the Sphere show", "Grand Canyon helicopter tour") into a Hotelbeds activityCode. Returns ranked candidates {activityCode, name, destinationCode, fromPrice}; hand the activityCode to pricetik_activity_details (rates + rateKeys) or pricetik_activity_search. Op

tools.name: pricetik_trending_deals
tools.description: Today's best deals ranked 0-100, across every vertical, with no specific product ("what are the best deals right now?"). `surface`: shopping (default, retail deals by stored score), hotels (biggest 7-day nightly-rate drops), events (activity rate drops), tickets (live-event tickets below their 30-da

tools.name: pricetik_itinerary_export
tools.description: Export the authenticated user's bookings as an RFC-5545 .ics calendar string plus a structured events array, ready to drop onto a calendar app. Upcoming-only by default; pass includePast=true for the full history. The capstone to pricetik_trip_plan / pricetik_my_trips. Requires a bearer API key; Ope

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_create
tools.description: Start a shared GROUP trip-planning session that friends join by share code — the multi-user counterpart to pricetik_trip_plan. Pass destination (plus optional checkIn/checkOut/title). Returns the session, a shareCode, and a shareUrl (pricetik.com/trips/<code>) — give BOTH to the user so companions c

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_get
tools.description: Fetch a group trip session — status, members (display names only), candidate options with per-option vote tallies (upvotes / downvotes / score), and the caller's own votes. Look up by sessionId or shareCode (exactly one). Poll this after adding options or between conversations to see how the group i

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_join
tools.description: Join a group trip session by share code (idempotent — joining twice is safe). Pass an optional displayName so other members see who voted. After joining, the caller can read the session, add candidate options, and vote. Requires an authenticated API key (the membership is owned by the PriceTik accou

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_add_option
tools.description: Propose a candidate to the group — a hotel, activity, live-event ticket, or transfer found via the normal search tools. Pass the surface plus a ref object carrying the surface identifier (hotel: propertyId or providerPropertyId; activity: activityCode; ticket: the event id from pricetik_ticket_searc

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_vote
tools.description: Record the caller's vote on a candidate option: 1 (up) or -1 (down). One vote per member per option — voting again replaces the previous vote (upsert), so changing one's mind is safe. Member-only (403 otherwise). After voting, read pricetik_group_trip_get for the updated tallies.

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_finalize
tools.description: Lock in the group's plan (organizer-only; 403 for other members). Pass optionIds to finalize the winning subset — read pricetik_group_trip_get first and pick the top-voted options; when optionIds is omitted, ALL candidate options are locked in. Returns the finalized plan grouped by surface with vote

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a group trip session (organizer-only; 403 OrganizerOnly for other members). Closes a still-planning session — status moves to "cancelled". A finalized session cannot be cancelled (409 AlreadyFinalized); a re-cancel returns 409 SessionNotOpen. Coordinate-only: cancelling never touches a bookin

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_remove_option
tools.description: Remove a candidate option from a group trip session (organizer-only; 403 OrganizerOnly for other members). Only works while the session is still planning (409 once finalized/cancelled); returns 404 OptionNotFound when the optionId is not on this session. The option's votes are removed with it. Use t

tools.name: pricetik_group_trip_reopen
tools.description: Reopen a FINALIZED group trip session back to planning (organizer-only; 403 OrganizerOnly for other members) — the explicit undo for pricetik_group_trip_finalize, which is otherwise irreversible. Clears the finalized selection so the group can keep deliberating, then re-finalize when ready. Only a f

tools.name: pricetik_my_group_trips
tools.description: List the authenticated user's group-trip sessions (as organizer or member), newest activity first. Each row carries the sessionId + shareCode (plus title, destination, status, your role, and memberCount) needed to RESUME a trip — vote, add options, or finalize. Call this when a returning user refere

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "pricetik_my_trips" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: pricetik_search, pricetik_hotel_details, pricetik_hotel_get_booking_url, pricetik_ticket_search, pricetik_events_near, pricetik_activity_get_booking_url, pricetik_trip_plan, pricetik_my_trips, pricetik_trending_deals, pricetik_group_trip_create, pricetik_group_trip_add_option · Private data: pricetik_hotel_details, pricetik_activity_search, pricetik_destinations, pricetik_my_trips, pricetik_resolve_activity, pricetik_trending_deals, pricetik_itinerary_export, pricetik_group_trip_create, pricetik_group_trip_get, pricetik_group_trip_join, pricetik_group_trip_vote, pricetik_group_trip_cancel, pricetik_group_trip_remove_option, pricetik_group_trip_reopen, pricetik_my_group_trips · Public sink: pricetik_itinerary_export, pricetik_group_trip_create, pricetik_group_trip_join · Destructive: pricetik_itinerary_export, pricetik_group_trip_remove_option.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: pricetik_search, pricetik_hotel_details, pricetik_hotel_get_booking_url, pricetik_ticket_search, pricetik_events_near, pricetik_activity_get_booking_url, pricetik_trip_plan, pricetik_my_trips, pricetik_trending_deals, pricetik_group_trip_create, pricetik_group_trip_add_option · Private data: pricetik_hotel_details, pricetik_activity_search, pricetik_destinations, pricetik_my_trips, pricetik_resolve_activity, pricetik_trending_deals, pricetik_itinerary_export, pricetik_group_trip_create, pricetik_group_trip_get, pricetik_group_trip_join, pricetik_group_trip_vote, pricetik_group_trip_cancel, pricetik_group_trip_remove_option, pricetik_group_trip_reopen, pricetik_my_group_trips · Public sink: pricetik_itinerary_export, pricetik_group_trip_create, pricetik_group_trip_join · Destructive: pricetik_itinerary_export, pricetik_group_trip_remove_option

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

detail: Tool "pricetik_search" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Discovery search across PriceTik surfaces (shopping/hotels/events) — see the `surface` param for what each value returns. For a SPECIFIC intent prefer the dedicated tool (`pricetik_hotel_search`, `pricetik_activity_search`) for richer, date-accurate results in their own widget; use `pricetik_search`" → after: "Discovery search across PriceTik surfaces (shopping/hotels/events) — see the `surface` param for what each value returns. For a SPECIFIC intent prefer the dedicated tool (`pricetik_hotel_search`, `pricetik_activity_search`) for richer, date-accurate results in their own widget; use `pricetik_search`"

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

Returns current status, resolved tier, and active feature flags. free tier caps open target prices at 3). The block is omitted for anonymous callers." → after: "Check Intel API health and feature flag state. Use before making calls to verify the API is available. Returns current status, resolved tier, and active feature flags. For an authenticated caller it also returns an `account` block — `tokenBalance` and `tokensInCooldown`. The block is omitted for ano"

For a SPECIFIC named hotel ("the Wynn"), resolve it first with pricetik_destinations (returns a providerPropertyId) and pass that to pricetik_hotel_watch_rate / _get_bookin" → after: "Search hotels by DESTINATION (city, region, or landmark) + dates + guest count — `destination` is geographic, NOT a hotel name. For a SPECIFIC named hotel ("the Wynn"), resolve it first with pricetik_destinations (returns a providerPropertyId) and pass that to pricetik_hotel_get_booking_url / _detai"

remediation.title: Tool removed since last scan
remediation.detail: Tool "pricetik_hotel_rate_history" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.
